title: Vivijure MuseTalk
description: Lip-sync finish engine for Vivijure. Takes a face clip and a dialogue track, returns a clip whose mouth matches the speech (MuseTalk). Models are baked into the image. Requires a Cloudflare R2 bucket shared with your Studio for finish-chain mode.

config.gpuIds: BLACKWELL_180,HOPPER_141,-NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Max-Q Workstation Edition,-NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition,-NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

input.name: R2 S3 endpoint
input.description: Your Cloudflare R2 S3 endpoint, e.g. https://<account-id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com (note: this satellite uses R2_ENDPOINT_URL, not R2_ENDPOINT)

input.name: R2 access key ID
input.description: The public half of your R2 storage key.

input.name: R2 secret access key
input.description: The secret half of your R2 storage key. Keep it private.

input.name: R2 bucket
input.description: The R2 bucket shared with your Vivijure Studio.
